note: Created src/WgSocket/ project with NativeMethods.cs containing LibraryImport declarations for wg_device_new, wg_device_free, wg_device_configure, wg_device_get_config, wg_last_error, and wgsocket_ping. All use source-generated marshalling, IntPtr for opaque handles, MarshalAs(LPUTF8Str) for string params, and raw byte pointers for buffers. Builds clean with .NET 8 source generator (0 warnings, 0 errors).
